steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The blank follows "variations in glucosinolates could not be ______ soil microbes specifically." The researchers tested whether soil microbes cause flavor variations but found they couldn't pin the variations on microbes. The blank needs a phrase meaning "caused by" or "linked to."

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — forestalled by: means prevented before it happens. The passage discusses explaining a cause, not preventing an event. ✗
  • Choice B — subverted by: means undermined or sabotaged. No undermining is described. ✗
  • Choice C — attributed to: means credited to or explained by as a cause. "Variations could not be attributed to soil microbes" means the microbes couldn't be identified as the cause — exactly what the passage states. ✓
  • Choice D — excluded from: means left out or barred from. The variations aren't being excluded from anything. ✗
That confirms C is correct.
